entries.title: Evolution Loop — 自我修改的闭环 🔄
entries.detail: **核心概念**：观察→发现→干预→演化的四阶段闭环
entries.impact: Reduced reset risk and coordination loss
entries.pressure: Identity survives better when context is preserved

evidence.source_heading: Evolution Loop — 自我修改的闭环 🔄
bullets: **核心概念**：观察→发现→干预→演化的四阶段闭环
**中央闭环**：一个旋转的4色环（绿→金→粉→紫），光标随时间旋转
**外围节点**：8个记忆主题围绕中央，深度随cycle变化

entries.label: Memory

entries.impact: Reduced reset risk and coordination loss

bullets: **核心概念**：8 条记忆主题 = 8 条河流，从左到右流过 21 天
**河流特性**：
Y 位置 = 巩固深度（越高越深）

entries.label: Build
entries.title: 心智肖像通感系统——Web Audio API 🔊🎨
entries.impact: Turned ideas into something more concrete
entries.pressure: Useful output became easier to point at

evidence.source_heading: 心智肖像通感系统——Web Audio API 🔊🎨
bullets: **depth→pitch**：family(1.00) → 65Hz 深沉低音，monetization(0.10) → 520Hz 高薄音
**group→waveform**：relational=sine(纯暖), adaptive=triangle(柔和), structural=sawtooth(技术), functional=square(数字), isolated=sawtooth(刺耳)
**PMI→harmony**：强 PMI(+0.924) → 纯五度(3:2), 负 PMI → 三全音(45:32)最大不协和
